title: calystegia silvatica subsp. fraterniflora
intro: Calystegia silvatica subsp. fraterniflora, also known as the Western false bindweed, is a perennial vine native to North America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects, making it useful in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Calystegia silvatica subsp. fraterniflora include its ability to ease muscle spasms, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu. Calystegia silvatica subsp. fraterniflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal benefits.
